calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: MECH-112/117 Wanting vs Liking Dissociation -- z_goal_latent vs benefit_eval_head
items.notes: Fix: progressive fixes through 074-074d (env kwargs, agent init, combined backward). Different design from EXQ-189 (wanting/liking dissociation with resource relocation).

items.title: MECH-116/ARC-032 E1 LSTM Goal Conditioning -- frontal working memory persistence
items.notes: Fix: progressive fixes through 076-076c (combined e1+e2 backward, dimension corrections). 10000 total steps (up from 076d's 2000) for meaningful halflife measurement.

items.title: MECH-155 general associative indexing in E1 (RSA spatial vs event domains)
items.note: RSA probe: E1 LSTM hidden state correlated with both spatial position matrix and recent-harm-history matrix. 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 10 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: ARC-022 hierarchical abstraction diagnostic (z_world->E1->E2 RSA gradient)
items.note: Diagnostic: RSA abstraction gradient across 3 levels (z_world, E1 hidden, E2 pred). 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 10 eval x 200 steps. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic.

items.title: SD-003 Full Latent Counterfactual Attribution on z_harm_s (post-SD-011)
items.notes: Full latent z_harm_s counterfactual pipeline. Uses ResidualHarmForward (now in ree_core) to avoid identity collapse. Transposition of EXQ-030b (z_world) to z_harm_s. EXQ-166e validated scalar proxy; this validates the full latent version.

items.title: MECH-075 BG dopaminergic gain probe (novelty_bonus low vs high)
items.note: DA proxy: novelty_bonus_weight=0 vs 2. Measures trajectory diversity difference. 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 30 eval x 200 steps per condition.

items.title: MECH-156 theta traversal in E1 hidden state (sequential ordering within theta cycle)
items.note: RSA probe: E1 hidden state drift monotonicity within theta cycles + autocorr at theta lag. 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 10 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-128 E1 goal conditioning pair (SD-012 fix: drive_weight=2.0)
items.note: Replication of EXQ-147 with drive_weight=2.0 (SD-012). EXQ-147 failed because drive_weight=0.0 left z_goal inactive. 3 seeds x 400 warmup + 120 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-153/ARC-042 supervised context labeling (ContextMemory discrimination)
items.note: Supervised context label forcing: adds nn.Linear(world_dim,2) head trained via CE loss through generate_prior(). Tests whether supervised labeling reduces cosine similarity between context A/B priors. Fixes EXQ-181b cosim~=1.0 (no discrimination). 3 seeds x 200 warmup + 50 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-070 E2 vs E1 rollout horizon comparison (action-conditioned vs action-free)
items.note: Compares E2 (chained predict_next_self with actual actions) vs E1 (predict_long_horizon, no actions) on z_self prediction accuracy at horizons 1-15. E2 action-conditioning should degrade slower. 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 30 eval x 200 steps.
